## Purpose

Describe the documentation, translation, or table-format correction.

## Evidence

Link to the official authority or source where relevant.

## Checklist

- [ ] This change does not include Go source code or a binary.
- [ ] I have the right to contribute the submitted material.
- [ ] I did not alter official prayer times.
- [ ] I removed personal or sensitive information.
- [ ] The wording does not present Sakoon as a religious authority.
- [ ] The change is focused and documented.
